company.what_they_do: punkproof.com is a public/shared email service provider — it offers free email addresses to the general public (anyone can register an address @punkproof.com). It is not a company product or proprietary business tool; it is a consumer-facing, open-registration email hosting platform. The homepage explicitly positions itself as a legitimate (non-throwaway) public email service focused on spam prevention and abuse control.
company.raw_notes: - Shared public email domain, not a private corporate domain. Any member of the public can obtain an @punkproof.com address. - The homepage is directed at third-party operators/webmasters (asking them not to block the domain), not at business customers. - Explicitly states it prohibits illegal activities and has an abuse ticket system. - States emails 'will not bounce' and it is 'not a throwaway email service' — language aimed at reassuring site operators who might blocklist it. - No products, services, team, pricing, or company 'About' content found. No indication of a real business called 'Alicesec' associated with this domain.
